---
name: Wrong or missing unit data
about: Stats, points, weapons, abilities, or keywords that look wrong for a specific unit
title: "[Data] "
labels: data
---

Before filing: check whether the data in [BSData/wh40k-10e](https://github.com/BSData/wh40k-10e) or [BSData/wh40k-11e](https://github.com/BSData/wh40k-11e) is itself wrong (that's an upstream issue, not this repo's) versus this API misrepresenting correct BSData source data (that's a parser bug worth filing here).

## Unit

Edition (`10e`/`11e`), faction, and unit name or ID.

## What's Wrong

What field is incorrect, and what it should be instead.

## Upstream Check

- [ ] I checked the relevant BSData source and the data there is correct (so this is a parser bug)
